source.description: Built-in image generation created a six-panel marker process contact sheet for the smiling-cloud-doodle lesson.
source.notes: The contact sheet was reviewed before cropping; the final panel is used as the finished asset.

process_strategy: The six frames keep one centered cloud doodle, introducing the cloud bumps, face, raindrops, tiny sun peek, bold outline, marker fills, and highlights before the final pass.

final_elements.name: puffy cloud body
final_elements.description: A puffy cloud shape creates the main doodle silhouette.

final_elements.name: smiling face
final_elements.description: Two simple eyes and a curved smile sit on the cloud front.

final_elements.name: three raindrops
final_elements.description: Three rounded raindrops hang below the cloud.

final_elements.name: tiny sun peek
final_elements.description: A small half sun with short rays peeks from behind one cloud edge.

final_elements.name: thick black outline
final_elements.description: A bold black marker outline wraps the cloud, face, drops, and sun.

final_elements.name: bright marker fills
final_elements.description: Blue, yellow, and pink marker fills add cheerful weather-doodle color.

frames.visible_job: Draw the puffy cloud outline with rounded bumps.
Place the simple eyes and curved smile on the cloud front.
Draw three rounded raindrops below the cloud with even spacing.
Tuck a tiny half sun and short rays behind one side of the cloud.
Thicken the black outline and add blue, yellow, and pink marker fills.

final_step.visible_job: Retrace existing cloud, face, raindrop, and sun edges, even out the marker fills, and add tiny highlights only to existing shapes.

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
